product.name: ArGiyim 360 Denim
product.familyDescriptorPl: Denim i ripstop na odzież outdoor
product.familyDescriptorEn: Denim and ripstop for outdoor wear
product.categorySourceGroup: Ripstop, elasthane and denim fabrics for outdoor wear.
product.specLine: 360 g/m², 50% Polyester 50% Cotton, Denim Woven Fabric
descriptions: 50% Polyester 50% Cotton denim twill fabric. The front side of the fabric is polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions and light, the back side of the fabric is cotton which provides breathability to the user.
ArGiyim 360 Denim are used for pants and trousers.
360 g/m², 50% Polyester 50% Cotton, Denim Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 2500N ; Weft > 1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 50N ; Weft > 40N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Workwear-style durable denim could theoretically be used for uniformed services, but no military/police/tactical use is stated.

stage1.noMatchReason: Product is a generic denim workwear fabric (50% PES/50% CO twill, 360 g/m²) explicitly intended for pants/trousers used in work conditions; no explicit military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hivis, medical, sport, architectural or transport application is stated in the supplied data.

evidence: ArGiyim 360 Denim are used for pants and trousers.
polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly described as a denim workwear fabric intended for work pants/trousers, with durability suited for work conditions. No narrower named sector (military, firefighting, welding, etc.) is stated, so it falls under general workwear and industrial apparel.

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary application is explicitly supported by the data; only generic workwear use is described.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: No explicit military, police or tactical use is stated; stage1 advisory explicitly rejected this.
Category descriptor mentions outdoor wear, but explicit application is workwear pants, not leisure/outdoor apparel.
